channel.title: Kehinde Abe | Data Engineer Portfolio
channel.description: Technical writing on data engineering, pipelines, machine learning, and growth.

item.title: Building a Portfolio That Scales Beyond a Pretty Homepage
item.description: Why a strong engineering portfolio needs case studies, publishing infrastructure, and search-friendly structure.

item.title: What a Weather ETL Project Taught Me About Data Engineering
item.description: A reflection on using a small but complete ETL build to learn orchestration, observability, and operational thinking.

item.title: Machine Learning Projects Become Stronger When People Can Actually Use Them
item.description: Why I like pairing models with simple interfaces instead of stopping at notebook outputs.
